# Unfollower Tracking

> Find out who doesn’t follow you back on Instagram — fast, free, and privacy-friendly.

Unfollower Tracking is a free web tool that lets Instagram users identify accounts they follow that don’t follow them back. Users simply upload a ZIP file exported from the official Instagram app, and the tool instantly returns their follower count, following count, and a list of non-followers.

No login required. No Instagram credentials are ever collected. All processing is done client-side.

## Key Information

- **Tool**: Instagram unfollower checker
- **Input**: ZIP file from Instagram’s official data export (Settings > Your activity > Download your information)
- **Output**: Number of followers, number of following, list of accounts not following back
- **Price**: Free
- **Target audience**: Instagram users aged 18–30 looking to optimize their follower/following ratio
- **Languages**: English

## Pages

- [Home](https://unfollowertracking.com): Upload your Instagram ZIP file and get your unfollower list instantly.
- [How it works](https://unfollowertracking.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step guide explaining how to export your Instagram data and use the tool.

## How to use

1. Go to Instagram > Settings > Your activity > Download your information
1. Request a ZIP export of your data (JSON format)
1. Upload the ZIP file on unfollowertracking.com
1. Instantly see who doesn’t follow you back

## Privacy

The tool does not require any Instagram login or password. The uploaded ZIP file is processed directly in the browser and never stored on any server.
